source_notes: Change in OI and volume are from the F&O-UDiFF Common Bhavcopy Final file.
Volatility fields are from NSE F&O-Daily Volatility (FOVOLT); NSE historical archives do not provide per-contract implied volatility in the bhavcopy.
Delta is from NSE F&O-NCL Contract Delta. Other option Greeks were not found in the NSE historical archive files inspected.
India VIX is from NSE index daily snapshot.
FII/Client/DII/Pro open-interest totals are from NSE participant-wise open interest CSV and are date-level aggregates repeated on combined rows for that date.
